description: Adversarial invariant for issue #64 and #62 removals: avoid reintroducing broad application dependencies as hard prerequisites.

checks.reason: Green hydrogen does not require grid-scale battery storage as a method prerequisite.
Green hydrogen should remain connected to the documented renewable electricity source for its 2004 Utsira chronology anchor.
Electrolyser manufacturing should remain upstream of electrolysis-based green hydrogen as a positive control.
Rocketry predates jet engines and should not depend on the later aviation engine category.
Rocketry should remain upstream of narrower liquid-fuel rocket technology.
Rocketry should remain earlier than jet engines in the current scoped chronology.
